name: Zooka!
description: Fires a three-rocket burst while only consuming one round of launcher ammo. The rockets travel slowly but hit hard, making it more dependable at mid range than single-shot launchers that can whiff. Reload time is notably sluggish.
notes: Drops randomly from any appropriate loot source. Among Bandit-made launchers, it is the slowest for both reload speed and rocket travel speed.
